info.name: Tally Prime - Ledger & Accounts API
info.description: Complete API collection for fetching Ledger and Account data from Tally Prime via ODBC/XML

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>AllLedgers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="LedgerList">
            <TYPE>Ledger</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, PARENT, OPENINGBALANCE, CLOSINGBALANCE, ADDRESS, LEDGERPHONE, LEDGEREMAIL</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch all ledgers with opening and closing balances
Get detailed information for a specific ledger

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>DayBook</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="DayBookEntries">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, VOUCHERTYPENAME, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, NARRATION</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Get all ledger entries (Day Book) for a date range

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>Groups</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="GroupsList">
            <TYPE>Group</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, PARENT, ISREVENUE, ISDEEMEDPOSITIVE</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>CashBankLedgers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="CashBankList">
            <TYPE>Ledger</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, PARENT, CLOSINGBALANCE</FETCH>
            <FILTER>CashBankFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CashBankFilter">
            $$IsCashOrBank:$PARENT OR $PARENT = "Bank Accounts" OR $PARENT = "Cash-in-Hand"
          </SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Get only Cash and Bank ledgers with balances

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>Debtors</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="DebtorsList">
            <TYPE>Ledger</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, PARENT, CLOSINGBALANCE, ADDRESS, LEDGERPHONE, LEDGEREMAIL</FETCH>
            <FILTER>DebtorsFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="DebtorsFilter">
            $PARENT = "Sundry Debtors"
          </SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>Creditors</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="CreditorsList">
            <TYPE>Ledger</TYPE>
            <FETCH>NAME, PARENT, CLOSINGBALANCE, ADDRESS, LEDGERPHONE, LEDGEREMAIL</FETCH>
            <FILTER>CreditorsFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="CreditorsFilter">
            $PARENT = "Sundry Creditors"
          </SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>
